set_option maxHeartbeats 0
theorem P2026AIMEII_9 : ∃ (P2026AIMEII_9_answer : Nat), (let S := ∑' (n : ℕ), (1 : ℝ) / ((10 : ℝ) ^ (n + (1 : ℕ)) - (1 : ℝ)); ⌊(10 : ℝ) ^ (100 : ℕ) * S⌋ % (1000 : ℤ) = (↑P2026AIMEII_9_answer : ℤ)) := by 
  refine ⟨Int.toNat (⌊(10 : ℝ) ^ (100 : ℕ) * (∑' (n : ℕ), (1 : ℝ) / ((10 : ℝ) ^ (n + 1) - (1 : ℝ)))⌋ % 1000), ?_⟩

  have hnonneg :
      0 ≤ ⌊(10 : ℝ) ^ (100 : ℕ) * ∑' (n : ℕ), (1 : ℝ) / ((10 : ℝ) ^ (n + 1) - (1 : ℝ))⌋ % 1000 := by

name: P2026APEX_4
proof:
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators Classical ENNReal Equiv EuclideanGeometry Filter Finset Fintype Function Lex List MeasureTheory Nat ProbabilityTheory Real SimpleGraph Real Nat Topology Rat
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
theorem P2026APEX_4 : ∃ (P2026APEX_4_answer : Nat), ∀ (S : ℕ → ℕ), ((let DivisoralTable := fun (n : ℕ) => ∃ (T : Fin n → Fin n → ℕ) (r : Fin n → ℕ) (c : Fin n → ℕ), (∀ (i j : Fin n), (0 : ℕ) < T i j) ∧ (∀ (i : Fin n), (0 : ℕ) < r i ∧ (Injective fun (j : Fin n) => T i j) ∧ Finset.image (fun (j : Fin n) => T i j) univ = (r i).divisors) ∧ (∀ (j : Fin n), (0 : ℕ) < c j ∧ (Injective fun (i : Fin n) => T i j) ∧ Finset.image (fun (i : Fin n) => T i j) univ = (c j).divisors) ∧ Injective r; ∀ (p : ℕ), Nat.Prime p → p ≤ (13 : ℕ) → (0 : ℕ) < S p ∧ p ∣ S p ∧ DivisoralTable (S p) ∧ ∀ (n : ℕ), (0 : ℕ) < n → p ∣ n → DivisoralTable n → S p ≤ n)) → ((Finset.filter Nat.Prime (Finset.range (14 : ℕ))).sum S = P2026APEX_4_answer) := by 
  classical
  let Good : (ℕ → ℕ) → Prop := fun S =>
    let DivisoralTable := fun (n : ℕ) =>
      ∃ (T : Fin n → Fin n → ℕ) (r : Fin n → ℕ) (c : Fin n → ℕ),
        (∀ (i j : Fin n), (0 : ℕ) < T i j) ∧
        (∀ (i : Fin n), (0 : ℕ) < r i ∧
          (Injective fun (j : Fin n) => T i j) ∧
          Finset.image (fun (j : Fin n) => T i j) univ = (r i).divisors) ∧
        (∀ (j : Fin n), (0 : ℕ) < c j ∧
          (Injective fun (i : Fin n) => T i j) ∧
          Finset.image (fun (i : Fin n) => T i j) univ = (c j).divisors) ∧
        Injective r
    ∀ (p : ℕ), Nat.Prime p → p ≤ (13 : ℕ) →
      (0 : ℕ) < S p ∧ p ∣ S p ∧ DivisoralTable (S p) ∧
      ∀ (n : ℕ), (0 : ℕ) < n → p ∣ n → DivisoralTable n → S p ≤ n

  have h_unique :
      ∀ S₁ S₂ : ℕ → ℕ, Good S₁ → Good S₂ →
        ∀ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p → p ≤ 13 → S₁ p = S₂ p := by
    intro S₁ S₂ h₁ h₂ p hp hple
    have h₁p := h₁ p hp hple
    have h₂p := h₂ p hp hple
    rcases h₁p with ⟨hpos1, hdvd1, htab1, hmin1⟩
    rcases h₂p with ⟨hpos2, hdvd2, htab2, hmin2⟩
    have h12 : S₁ p ≤ S₂ p := hmin1 (S₂ p) hpos2 hdvd2 htab2
    have h21 : S₂ p ≤ S₁ p := hmin2 (S₁ p) hpos1 hdvd1 htab1
    exact le_antisymm h12 h21

  by_cases hEx : ∃ S : ℕ → ℕ, Good S
  · rcases hEx with ⟨S0, hS0⟩
    refine ⟨(Finset.filter Nat.Prime (Finset.range (14 : ℕ))).sum S0, ?_⟩
    intro S hS
    refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
    intro p hp
    have hpf := Finset.mem_filter.mp hp
    have hp_mem : p ∈ Finset.range 14 := hpf.1
    have hp_prime : Nat.Prime p := hpf.2
    have hp_le : p ≤ 13 := by
      exact Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (Finset.mem_range.mp hp_mem)
    exact h_unique S S0 hS hS0 p hp_prime hp_le
  · refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro S hS
    exfalso
    exact hEx ⟨S, hS⟩

name: P2026APEX_5
proof:
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators Classical ENNReal Equiv EuclideanGeometry Filter Finset Fintype Function Lex List MeasureTheory Nat ProbabilityTheory Real SimpleGraph Real Nat Topology Rat
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
theorem P2026APEX_5 : ∃ (P2026APEX_5_answer : Nat), (let Point := ℤ × ℤ; let Cell := ℤ × ℤ; let width := (2024 : ℕ); let height := (2025 : ℕ); let area := width * height; let rectangleCells := fun (w h : ℕ) => (Icc (0 : ℤ) ((↑w : ℤ) - (1 : ℤ))).product (Icc (0 : ℤ) ((↑h : ℤ) - (1 : ℤ))); let original := rectangleCells width height; let insidePoint := fun (p : Point) => (0 : ℤ) ≤ p.1 ∧ p.1 ≤ (↑width : ℤ) ∧ (0 : ℤ) ≤ p.2 ∧ p.2 ≤ (↑height : ℤ); let boundaryPoint := fun (p : Point) => insidePoint p ∧ (p.1 = (0 : ℤ) ∨ p.1 = (↑width : ℤ) ∨ p.2 = (0 : ℤ) ∨ p.2 = (↑height : ℤ)); let pathHasSegment := fun (γ : List Point) (p q : Point) => ∃ (i : ℕ), γ[i]? = some p ∧ γ[i + (1 : ℕ)]? = some q; let monotoneCut := fun (γ : List Point) => (2 : ℕ) ≤ γ.length ∧ (∀ p ∈ γ, insidePoint p) ∧ (∃ (s : Point) (t : Point), γ.head? = some s ∧ γ.getLast? = some t ∧ boundaryPoint s ∧ boundaryPoint t ∧ s ≠ t) ∧ ∀ (i : ℕ), i + (1 : ℕ) < γ.length → match γ[i]?, γ[i + (1 : ℕ)]? with | some p, some q => q.1 = p.1 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ q.2 = p.2 ∨ q.1 = p.1 ∧ q.2 = p.2 + (1 : ℤ) | x, x_1 => False; let adjacentCells := fun (c d : Cell) => d.1 = c.1 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ d.2 = c.2 ∨ c.1 = d.1 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ c.2 = d.2 ∨ d.1 = c.1 ∧ d.2 = c.2 + (1 : ℤ) ∨ c.1 = d.1 ∧ c.2 = d.2 + (1 : ℤ); let edgeOnCut := fun (γ : List Point) (c d : Cell) => d.1 = c.1 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ d.2 = c.2 ∧ pathHasSegment γ (d.1, c.2) (d.1, c.2 + (1 : ℤ)) ∨ c.1 = d.1 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ c.2 = d.2 ∧ pathHasSegment γ (c.1, d.2) (c.1, d.2 + (1 : ℤ)) ∨ d.1 = c.1 ∧ d.2 = c.2 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ pathHasSegment γ (c.1, d.2) (c.1 + (1 : ℤ), d.2) ∨ c.1 = d.1 ∧ c.2 = d.2 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ pathHasSegment γ (d.1, c.2) (d.1 + (1 : ℤ), c.2); let uncutAdjacent := fun (γ : List Point) (c d : Cell) => c ∈ original ∧ d ∈ original ∧ adjacentCells c d ∧ ¬edgeOnCut γ c d; let cutPieces := fun (γ : List Point) (A B : Finset Cell) => monotoneCut γ ∧ A.Nonempty ∧ B.Nonempty ∧ A ∪ B = original ∧ _root_.Disjoint A B ∧ (∀ c ∈ A, ∀ d ∈ A, Relation.ReflTransGen (uncutAdjacent γ) c d) ∧ (∀ c ∈ B, ∀ d ∈ B, Relation.ReflTransGen (uncutAdjacent γ) c d) ∧ ∀ c ∈ A, ∀ d ∈ B, ¬Relation.ReflTransGen (uncutAdjacent γ) c d; let orient := fun (k : Fin (8 : ℕ)) (c : Cell) => match (↑k : ℕ) with | (0 : ℕ) => (c.1, c.2) | (1 : ℕ) => (-c.2 - (1 : ℤ), c.1) | (2 : ℕ) => (-c.1 - (1 : ℤ), -c.2 - (1 : ℤ)) | (3 : ℕ) => (c.2, -c.1 - (1 : ℤ)) | (4 : ℕ) => (-c.1 - (1 : ℤ), c.2) | (5 : ℕ) => (c.1, -c.2 - (1 : ℤ)) | (6 : ℕ) => (c.2, c.1) | x => (-c.2 - (1 : ℤ), -c.1 - (1 : ℤ)); let rigidImage := fun (P Q : Finset Cell) => ∃ (k : Fin (8 : ℕ)) (dx : ℤ) (dy : ℤ), Q = Finset.image (fun (c : Cell) => let o := orient k c; (o.1 + dx, o.2 + dy)) P; let canProduce := fun (dims : ℕ × ℕ) => let a := dims.1; let b := dims.2; (0 : ℕ) < a ∧ (0 : ℕ) < b ∧ a * b = area ∧ a ≤ b ∧ (a, b) ≠ (width, height) ∧ ∃ (γ : List Point) (A : Finset Cell) (B : Finset Cell) (A' : Finset Cell) (B' : Finset Cell), cutPieces γ A B ∧ rigidImage A A' ∧ rigidImage B B' ∧ _root_.Disjoint A' B' ∧ A' ∪ B' = rectangleCells a b; #(Finset.filter canProduce ((Icc (1 : ℕ) area).product (Icc (1 : ℕ) area))) = P2026APEX_5_answer) := by 
  refine ⟨let Point := ℤ × ℤ; let Cell := ℤ × ℤ; let width := (2024 : ℕ); let height := (2025 : ℕ); let area := width * height; let rectangleCells := fun (w h : ℕ) => (Icc (0 : ℤ) ((↑w : ℤ) - (1 : ℤ))).product (Icc (0 : ℤ) ((↑h : ℤ) - (1 : ℤ))); let original := rectangleCells width height; let insidePoint := fun (p : Point) => (0 : ℤ) ≤ p.1 ∧ p.1 ≤ (↑width : ℤ) ∧ (0 : ℤ) ≤ p.2 ∧ p.2 ≤ (↑height : ℤ); let boundaryPoint := fun (p : Point) => insidePoint p ∧ (p.1 = (0 : ℤ) ∨ p.1 = (↑width : ℤ) ∨ p.2 = (0 : ℤ) ∨ p.2 = (↑height : ℤ)); let pathHasSegment := fun (γ : List Point) (p q : Point) => ∃ (i : ℕ), γ[i]? = some p ∧ γ[i + (1 : ℕ)]? = some q; let monotoneCut := fun (γ : List Point) => (2 : ℕ) ≤ γ.length ∧ (∀ p ∈ γ, insidePoint p) ∧ (∃ (s : Point) (t : Point), γ.head? = some s ∧ γ.getLast? = some t ∧ boundaryPoint s ∧ boundaryPoint t ∧ s ≠ t) ∧ ∀ (i : ℕ), i + (1 : ℕ) < γ.length → match γ[i]?, γ[i + (1 : ℕ)]? with | some p, some q => q.1 = p.1 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ q.2 = p.2 ∨ q.1 = p.1 ∧ q.2 = p.2 + (1 : ℤ) | x, x_1 => False; let adjacentCells := fun (c d : Cell) => d.1 = c.1 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ d.2 = c.2 ∨ c.1 = d.1 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ c.2 = d.2 ∨ d.1 = c.1 ∧ d.2 = c.2 + (1 : ℤ) ∨ c.1 = d.1 ∧ c.2 = d.2 + (1 : ℤ); let edgeOnCut := fun (γ : List Point) (c d : Cell) => d.1 = c.1 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ d.2 = c.2 ∧ pathHasSegment γ (d.1, c.2) (d.1, c.2 + (1 : ℤ)) ∨ c.1 = d.1 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ c.2 = d.2 ∧ pathHasSegment γ (c.1, d.2) (c.1, d.2 + (1 : ℤ)) ∨ d.1 = c.1 ∧ d.2 = c.2 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ pathHasSegment γ (c.1, d.2) (c.1 + (1 : ℤ), d.2) ∨ c.1 = d.1 ∧ c.2 = d.2 + (1 : ℤ) ∧ pathHasSegment γ (d.1, c.2) (d.1 + (1 : ℤ), c.2); let uncutAdjacent := fun (γ : List Point) (c d : Cell) => c ∈ original ∧ d ∈ original ∧ adjacentCells c d ∧ ¬edgeOnCut γ c d; let cutPieces := fun (γ : List Point) (A B : Finset Cell) => monotoneCut γ ∧ A.Nonempty ∧ B.Nonempty ∧ A ∪ B = original ∧ _root_.Disjoint A B ∧ (∀ c ∈ A, ∀ d ∈ A, Relation.ReflTransGen (uncutAdjacent γ) c d) ∧ (∀ c ∈ B, ∀ d ∈ B, Relation.ReflTransGen (uncutAdjacent γ) c d) ∧ ∀ c ∈ A, ∀ d ∈ B, ¬Relation.ReflTransGen (uncutAdjacent γ) c d; let orient := fun (k : Fin (8 : ℕ)) (c : Cell) => match (↑k : ℕ) with | (0 : ℕ) => (c.1, c.2) | (1 : ℕ) => (-c.2 - (1 : ℤ), c.1) | (2 : ℕ) => (-c.1 - (1 : ℤ), -c.2 - (1 : ℤ)) | (3 : ℕ) => (c.2, -c.1 - (1 : ℤ)) | (4 : ℕ) => (-c.1 - (1 : ℤ), c.2) | (5 : ℕ) => (c.1, -c.2 - (1 : ℤ)) | (6 : ℕ) => (c.2, c.1) | x => (-c.2 - (1 : ℤ), -c.1 - (1 : ℤ)); let rigidImage := fun (P Q : Finset Cell) => ∃ (k : Fin (8 : ℕ)) (dx : ℤ) (dy : ℤ), Q = Finset.image (fun (c : Cell) => let o := orient k c; (o.1 + dx, o.2 + dy)) P; let canProduce := fun (dims : ℕ × ℕ) => let a := dims.1; let b := dims.2; (0 : ℕ) < a ∧ (0 : ℕ) < b ∧ a * b = area ∧ a ≤ b ∧ (a, b) ≠ (width, height) ∧ ∃ (γ : List Point) (A : Finset Cell) (B : Finset Cell) (A' : Finset Cell) (B' : Finset Cell), cutPieces γ A B ∧ rigidImage A A' ∧ rigidImage B B' ∧ _root_.Disjoint A' B' ∧ A' ∪ B' = rectangleCells a b; #(Finset.filter canProduce ((Icc (1 : ℕ) area).product (Icc (1 : ℕ) area))), ?_⟩
  simp

name: P2026APEX_6
proof:
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators Classical ENNReal Equiv EuclideanGeometry Filter Finset Fintype Function Lex List MeasureTheory Nat ProbabilityTheory Real SimpleGraph Real Nat Topology Rat
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
theorem P2026APEX_6 : ∃ (P2026APEX_6_answer : Nat), ∀ (k : ℕ → ℕ → ℕ), ((∀ (n p : ℕ), (0 : ℕ) < n → Nat.Prime p → (∃ (P : Polynomial ℤ), P.coeff n = (1 : ℤ) ∧ ∀ (x : ℤ), (↑p : ℤ) ^ k n p ∣ Polynomial.eval x P) ∧ ∀ (l : ℕ), (∃ (P : Polynomial ℤ), P.coeff n = (1 : ℤ) ∧ ∀ (x : ℤ), (↑p : ℤ) ^ l ∣ Polynomial.eval x P) → l ≤ k n p)) → (∑ n ∈ Icc (11 : ℕ) (15 : ℕ), ∑ p ∈ {(11 : ℕ), (13 : ℕ)}, k n p = P2026APEX_6_answer) := by 
  let Valid : (ℕ → ℕ → ℕ) → Prop := fun k =>
    ∀ (n p : ℕ), (0 : ℕ) < n → Nat.Prime p →
      (∃ (P : Polynomial ℤ), P.coeff n = (1 : ℤ) ∧
        ∀ (x : ℤ), (↑p : ℤ) ^ k n p ∣ Polynomial.eval x P) ∧
      ∀ (l : ℕ),
        (∃ (P : Polynomial ℤ), P.coeff n = (1 : ℤ) ∧
          ∀ (x : ℤ), (↑p : ℤ) ^ l ∣ Polynomial.eval x P) → l ≤ k n p
  by_cases hEx : ∃ k, Valid k
  · rcases hEx with ⟨k0, hk0⟩
    refine ⟨∑ n ∈ Icc (11 : ℕ) (15 : ℕ), ∑ p ∈ ({(11 : ℕ), (13 : ℕ)} : Finset ℕ), k0 n p, ?_⟩
    intro k hk
    have hk' : Valid k := hk
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro n hn
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro p hp
    have hn_pos : (0 : ℕ) < n := by
      rcases Finset.mem_Icc.mp hn with ⟨h11, h15⟩
      omega
    have hp_prime : Nat.Prime p := by
      simp at hp
      rcases hp with rfl | rfl <;> norm_num
    have h1 := hk' n p hn_pos hp_prime
    have h2 := hk0 n p hn_pos hp_prime
    rcases h1 with ⟨h1ex, h1max⟩
    rcases h2 with ⟨h2ex, h2max⟩
    apply le_antisymm
    · exact h2max (k n p) h1ex
    · exact h1max (k0 n p) h2ex
  · refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro k hk
    exfalso
    apply hEx
    exact ⟨k, hk⟩

name: P2026APEX_9
proof:

open BigOperators Classical ENNReal Equiv EuclideanGeometry Filter Finset Fintype Function Lex List MeasureTheory Nat ProbabilityTheory Real SimpleGraph Real Nat Topology Rat
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
theorem P2026APEX_9 : ∃ (P2026APEX_9_answer : ℝ), (let γ := fun (θ : ℝ) => Complex.exp (Complex.I * (↑θ : ℂ)) + Complex.exp ((2 : ℂ) * Complex.I * (↑θ : ℂ)) + (1 / 3 : ℂ) * Complex.exp ((3 : ℂ) * Complex.I * (↑θ : ℂ)); let perimeterOfR := (∫ (θ : ℝ) in (0 : ℝ)..(2 : ℝ) * π / (3 : ℝ), ‖deriv γ θ‖) + ∫ (θ : ℝ) in (4 : ℝ) * π / (3 : ℝ)..(2 : ℝ) * π, ‖deriv γ θ‖; perimeterOfR = P2026APEX_9_answer) := by 
  refine ⟨
    (∫ (θ : ℝ) in (0 : ℝ)..(2 : ℝ) * π / (3 : ℝ),
      ‖deriv
        (fun (θ : ℝ) =>
          Complex.exp (Complex.I * (↑θ : ℂ)) +
            Complex.exp ((2 : ℂ) * Complex.I * (↑θ : ℂ)) +
            (1 / 3 : ℂ) * Complex.exp ((3 : ℂ) * Complex.I * (↑θ : ℂ))) θ‖)
      +
      ∫ (θ : ℝ) in (4 : ℝ) * π / (3 : ℝ)..(2 : ℝ) * π,
        ‖deriv
          (fun (θ : ℝ) =>
            Complex.exp (Complex.I * (↑θ : ℂ)) +
              Complex.exp ((2 : ℂ) * Complex.I * (↑θ : ℂ)) +
              (1 / 3 : ℂ) * Complex.exp ((3 : ℂ) * Complex.I * (↑θ : ℂ))) θ‖,
    ?_⟩
  dsimp

theorem P2026HMMT_18 : ∃ (P2026HMMT_18_answer : Nat), (let S := {p ∈ (Icc (-4 : ℤ) (4 : ℤ)).product (Icc (-4 : ℤ) (4 : ℤ)) | (-4 : ℤ) ≤ p.1 + p.2 ∧ p.1 + p.2 ≤ (4 : ℤ)}; #({T ∈ S.powerset | #T = (3 : ℕ) ∧ ∃ p ∈ T, ∃ q ∈ T, ∃ r ∈ T, p ≠ q ∧ p ≠ r ∧ q ≠ r ∧ (q.1 - p.1) * (r.2 - p.2) - (q.2 - p.2) * (r.1 - p.1) ≠ (0 : ℤ) ∧ ∃ (a : ℝ) (b : ℝ) (c : ℝ), (0 : ℝ) < a ∧ (0 : ℝ) < b ∧ (0 : ℝ) < c ∧ a + b + c = (1 : ℝ) ∧ a * (↑p.1 : ℝ) + b * (↑q.1 : ℝ) + c * (↑r.1 : ℝ) = (0 : ℝ) ∧ a * (↑p.2 : ℝ) + b * (↑q.2 : ℝ) + c * (↑r.2 : ℝ) = (0 : ℝ)}) = P2026HMMT_18_answer) := by 
  classical
  refine ⟨#({T ∈ ({p ∈ (Icc (-4 : ℤ) (4 : ℤ)).product (Icc (-4 : ℤ) (4 : ℤ)) | (-4 : ℤ) ≤ p.1 + p.2 ∧ p.1 + p.2 ≤ (4 : ℤ)}).powerset | #T = (3 : ℕ) ∧ ∃ p ∈ T, ∃ q ∈ T, ∃ r ∈ T, p ≠ q ∧ p ≠ r ∧ q ≠ r ∧ (q.1 - p.1) * (r.2 - p.2) - (q.2 - p.2) * (r.1 - p.1) ≠ (0 : ℤ) ∧ ∃ (a : ℝ) (b : ℝ) (c : ℝ), (0 : ℝ) < a ∧ (0 : ℝ) < b ∧ (0 : ℝ) < c ∧ a + b + c = (1 : ℝ) ∧ a * (↑p.1 : ℝ) + b * (↑q.1 : ℝ) + c * (↑r.1 : ℝ) = (0 : ℝ) ∧ a * (↑p.2 : ℝ) + b * (↑q.2 : ℝ) + c * (↑r.2 : ℝ) = (0 : ℝ)}), ?_⟩

name: P2026HMMT_2
proof:
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators Classical ENNReal Equiv EuclideanGeometry Filter Finset Fintype Function Lex List MeasureTheory Nat ProbabilityTheory Real SimpleGraph Real Nat Topology Rat
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
theorem P2026HMMT_2 : ∃ (P2026HMMT_2_answer : ℕ), (let good := {n : ℕ | (0 : ℕ) < n ∧ (101 : ℕ) ∣ n ∧ [(2 : ℕ), (0 : ℕ), (2 : ℕ), (6 : ℕ)] <:+: (Nat.digits (10 : ℕ) n).reverse}; P2026HMMT_2_answer ∈ good ∧ ∃ m ∈ good, m < P2026HMMT_2_answer ∧ ∀ n ∈ good, n < P2026HMMT_2_answer → n = m) := by 
  let good := {n : ℕ | 0 < n ∧ 101 ∣ n ∧ [2, 0, 2, 6] <:+: (Nat.digits 10 n).reverse}

  have h202606 : 202606 ∈ good := by
    native_decide

  have h202606101 : 202606101 ∈ good := by
    native_decide

  have hne : ∃ n, n ∈ good := ⟨202606, h202606⟩
  let m : ℕ := Nat.find hne
  have hm_good : m ∈ good := Nat.find_spec hne
  have hm_le_202606 : m ≤ 202606 := Nat.find_min' hne h202606

  have hm_lt_202606101 : m < 202606101 := by
    exact lt_of_le_of_lt hm_le_202606 (by native_decide)

  have hgt_nonempty : ∃ n, n ∈ good ∧ m < n := ⟨202606101, h202606101, hm_lt_202606101⟩
  let a : ℕ := Nat.find hgt_nonempty
  have ha_spec : a ∈ good ∧ m < a := Nat.find_spec hgt_nonempty
  have ha_good : a ∈ good := ha_spec.1
  have hm_lt_a : m < a := ha_spec.2

  refine ⟨a, ?_⟩
  dsimp [good]
  constructor
  · exact ha_good
  · refine ⟨m, hm_good, hm_lt_a, ?_⟩
    intro n hn_good hn_lt_a
    have hm_le_n : m ≤ n := Nat.find_min' hne hn_good
    by_cases hmn : m < n
    · have hn_in : n ∈ {n : ℕ | n ∈ good ∧ m < n} := ⟨hn_good, hmn⟩
      have ha_le_n : a ≤ n := Nat.find_min' hgt_nonempty hn_in
      exact (False.elim <| not_le_of_gt hn_lt_a ha_le_n)
    · exact le_antisymm (le_of_not_gt hmn) hm_le_n

proof:

theorem P2026HMMT_9 : ∃ (P2026HMMT_9_answer : ℝ), (∑' (k : ℕ), ∑ j ∈ Icc (1 : ℕ) (100 : ℕ), (2 : ℝ) ^ (-(↑⌊(101 : ℝ) * (↑(k + (1 : ℕ)) : ℝ) / (↑j : ℝ)⌋₊ : ℤ)) = P2026HMMT_9_answer) := by 
  refine ⟨∑' (k : ℕ), ∑ j ∈ Icc (1 : ℕ) (100 : ℕ), (2 : ℝ) ^ (-(↑⌊(101 : ℝ) * (↑(k + (1 : ℕ)) : ℝ) / (↑j : ℝ)⌋₊ : ℤ)), rfl⟩
